entry.title: New: CR 25-78 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-178, CD1, to authorize the execution of the Park Assessment Agreement for the Waiale Park Large Lot Subdivision, which would require Waiale 905 Partners, LLC to provide land in perpetuity or dedicate land for park and playground purposes as a condition of subdivision approval.

Water Authority, Social Services, and Parks Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
